title: houstonia caerulea var. minor
intro: Houstonia caerulea var. minor, also known as the small blue bluet or lesser bluet, is a perennial plant in the gentian family native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Houstonia caerulea var. minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe sore throats, and promote digestion, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
